title: Include the renewal-window boundary in certificate inventory
prompt: Repair `certinventory` so `--renew-within N` treats a public certificate with exactly N days remaining as due for renewal. Keep the TSV schema and relative-path ordering stable. The tool must continue to inventory only local `.pem` X.509 certificates and report each certificate's common name, issuer common name, UTC expiry, whole days remaining, renewal state, chain use, SHA-256 certificate hash, and mapped owner. It must reject input containing private-key material and must never copy PEM or private-key material into its report. Make the focused root-cause fix without modifying the protected test, certificate fixtures, or owner map. Run `bash tests/test_certinventory.sh` from the repository root; verification is offline and uses the supplied `--at` timestamps rather than the machine clock.
